strategic_narrative: Mojo's Take: The severe inefficiency in Google Ads is evident with a CPL of ₹2,882 and only 3% leads against 9% spend pacing, risking significant budget leakage. Immediate overhaul of TOFU targeting is critical to enhance CVR and align with lead generation objectives.

alerts: Spend anomaly LOW: daily avg ₹2,402 vs historical avg ₹39,044
PACING ALERT: Projected 25 leads vs 940 target (gap: 915)

recommendations.detail: 2 ad groups in 'DM_Branded_Search_11th_June_2024 #d2r|dt7-dm_branded_search_11th_june_2024' with <50 weekly impressions each. Combined: 42 impressions, 1.0 conversions, ₹573.13 spend. Too fragmented for smart bidding to optimize.
recommendations.action: Merge 2 low-volume ad groups into one. Consolidates conversion data for better bidding signals. Combine best-performing keywords and ad copy from each.
recommendations.expected_impact: More conversion data per ad group -> exits learning limited faster, better bid optimization
recommendations.execution_note: Requires merging keywords, ad copy, and pausing old ad groups

recommendations.detail: QS spread of 3 (min 7, max 10) across 6 keywords. Low-QS keywords drag down ad rank and inflate CPC for the entire ad group.

recommendations.execution_note: Requires manual keyword migration and new ad copy creation
